title: DuPont (DD) Up 31% in 6 Months: What's Behind the Rally?
text: DuPont (DD) gains on strong demand in water and industrial end markets, investment in new product development and pricing actions.

title: Why You Should Retain DuPont (DD) Stock in Your Portfolio
text: DuPont (DD) gains on healthy underlying demand in several end markets, focus on growth though innovation and pricing actions amid headwinds from sluggishness in some markets and input cost inflation.

title: 4 Diversified Chemical Stocks to Escape Industry Challenges
text: Demand worries due to weakness in certain markets and raw material cost inflation pose headwinds for the Zacks Chemicals Diversified industry. APD, DD, ALB and CBT are poised to navigate the industry challenges.

title: Why Is DuPont de Nemours (DD) Down 6.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: DuPont de Nemours (DD) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: 7 Blue-Chip Stocks to Buy for Quality-Focused Investors
text: When the game's on the line, sometimes you need to call up your most experienced players, which segues into this discussion of blue-chip stocks to buy. Any sports fan realizes that age comes for every athlete, including the great Tom Brady.
